tribe_v2_insight: Self-relevant stimuli produce unique neural fingerprints in medial prefrontal regions, increasing engagement and reducing critical evaluation
user_explanation: This targets your sense of identity, making you feel the message is personally relevant to who you are. By linking a choice to your self-image, it bypasses objective evaluation — you respond to protect or affirm your identity rather than assess the content critically.
legal_note: Identity-based targeting combined with algorithmic profiling raises concerns under GDPR Article 22 and the EU AI Act's provisions on subliminal manipulation.
